capabilities: Ensure input data conforms to predefined schemas before processing in Solidity contracts.

procedure.action: Specify JSON schema for input data and store in a version-controlled repository by specifying schema, constraints, and invariants in machine-readable form; include at least one falsifiable acceptance criterion where error_rate < 0.001.

Invoke Solidity's ABIEncoderV2 to parse input data and match against the JSON schema by invoking the target API with the specified parameters; assert response_status < 400 and response_time_ms < 5000; log request_id and response_code.

Invoke a pre-processing layer in the API Gateway to validate input data against the schema before forwarding to the contract following the specified pattern; write a unit test covering the primary code path; assert test_coverage >= 0.8 for the modified module before marking complete.

Log validation results using Structured Logging to track schema compliance using domain-appropriate tooling; assert error_count < 1 and result_valid = true; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.
Release a test suite using Truffle to simulate input scenarios and verify schema adherence.

summary: Integrate allowlist schema validation at input boundaries with Solidity smart contract development to enhance security and correctness.
title: Allowlist Schema Validation with Solidity

failureConditions: Invalid input data leads to contract execution errors; this occurs when the operation proceeds without pre-condition validation, allowing malformed input to propagate and corrupt downstream state silently.
Security vulnerabilities due to unchecked input data.
Increased debugging time due to lack of input validation logs.
metrics: test_coverage >= 0.8 for the modified module before marking complete
successConditions: Run automated tests to ensure 100% schema compliance for all input data; assert error_rate < 0.001 and operation_completed = true.
Check logs for any schema validation failures during contract execution; assert error_rate < 0.001 and operation_completed = true.
Verify that all input data is processed through the API Gateway validation layer; assert error_rate < 0.001 and operation_completed = true.
